location: Dropped by Falchion-wielding Demi-Humans. The best farming group is under the large ruin below where the NPC Kenneth Haight is first found, just north of the Mistwood Outskirts Site of Grace in eastern Limgrave.
tactics: Rest at Mistwood Outskirts grace, then head north to the ruin near where Kenneth Haight stands (an NPC tied to the Castle Morne questline — don't fight him, he's not the target)
The Demi-Humans fight as a pack and can swarm you; pull them toward a chokepoint rather than wading into the whole group
About 6 of the roughly 9 Demi-Humans here carry the Falchion, which helps offset its low (~2%) individual drop chance
The same enemy/weapon combo also appears in several other regions (Mountaintops of the Giants, Cerulean Coast, etc.) if this spot is inconvenient
lore: A simple single-edged curved blade suited to quick slashing strikes; it cuts cleanly through unarmored flesh but struggles to bite through heavy plate or thick scaled hide.

builds.name: Early Strength/Dexterity quality pick
builds.why: Low stat requirements (9 Str / 13 Dex) and even D/D scaling make it a cheap, immediately usable quality weapon early on.
